description:
Notes in Judaeo-Arabic concerning halakhic rulings. Recto looks more like jottings/exercises, while verso is a distinct note; all are in the same hand. Verso is headed "כלאם ר מ זל," i.e., "the words of the late R. M[...]." Regarding an oath to be imposed in a case of a debt with no legal deed to support it. Cites אלראב בן מאגש i.e. the Rav [Yosef] Ibn Migash (for this spelling of his name, see also T-S NS 216.37 (PGPID 9142)). Needs further examination. AA/ASE

Similar fragments by the same scribe (found via the FGP join finder): T-S NS 164.25, ENA NS 17.3
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
